name_en: Premium Original Leather M24545 Light Sakura Pink with Gold Clasp. This Capucines BB Handbag is crafted in small size with full-grain calfskin, featuring the LV lettering, iconic side ring, and Monogram floral flap. Detailed Features: 27 x 18 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)
